initiatives.name: SURJ Northland
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in the Duluth area. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through racial justice education and accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.

initiatives.name: Twin Ports DSA
initiatives.description: Twin Ports DSA is the Duluth/Superior chapter of The Democratic Socialists of America.
